verdict: NEGATIVE (direct proof out of reach); EMPIRICAL SUPPORT (plausible on restricted class)

BL_witness.comment: BL witness disproves UNRESTRICTED MO 2.9 but has M=1.652 >> 1.51, outside restricted class.

random_step_search.comment: Restricted class {M <= 1.51} is so thin that 4000 random draws produced zero feasible samples.

hill_climb_BL_perturbation.feasible_post_climb: none for any Mmax (perturbation always exits restricted class)
hill_climb_BL_perturbation.comment: BL violator is structurally tied to M near 1.65; no continuous deformation reduces M while preserving c_*.

structural_obstructions: Schwarz/symmetric-decreasing rearrangement runs the WRONG way (Riesz, _master_route_b_symmetric.md §3).
Hölder-Hausdorff-Young (MO Prop 2.11) gives P-side ceiling M_LB <= 1.116 (multifreq_mo217/derivation.md §6.1).
Bochner phase identity at peak (Lemma A1) is phased; cannot bound phaseless ||f||_2^2 (_master_lemma_a1_attack.md §3).
EL/compactness admits asymmetric solutions (no symmetry-forcing argument).
MV/MO/White toolkit cannot couple support-width to Hölder ratio c_*(f).

remaining_opening.name: BL-gap rigidity / no low-M asymmetric violators
remaining_opening.theorem_target: For nonneg pdf f on [-1/4,1/4] with int=1, ||f*f||_inf <= 1.378 implies ||f*f||_2^2 <= (log 16/pi)||f*f||_inf.
remaining_opening.evidence_for: 0 violators in 4000 random + 24000 Metropolis trials; MV-class c_*=0.589 << 0.8825; no known continuous low-M analogue of BL witness.
remaining_opening.evidence_against: No structural rigidity theorem ruling out continuous extension of BL-style asymmetric extremizers below M=1.65.
remaining_opening.required_new_ingredient: Coupling between support-width / asymmetry-degree of f and c_*(f); plausibly accessible via Cohn-Goncalves sign-uncertainty (Priority 1 in _master_blocker_diagnosis.md).
